summary: Completed Phase P4 SEO testing. All 17 backend tests pass. All 3 SEO frontend pages load correctly. Rate limiting headers working. Sitemap/robots.txt blocked by ingress (expected - only /api/* routes to backend).

notes.issue: Routes blocked by Kubernetes ingress - returns frontend HTML instead of XML/text
notes.reason: Ingress only routes /api/* to backend, non-api routes serve frontend
notes.solution: Either: (1) Add ingress rules for /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt, (2) Serve these files from frontend public folder, or (3) Rename to /api/sitemap.xml and /api/robots.txt

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/seo/countries returns Mexico with all required fields ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/cities/MX returns 10 cities including CDMX ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/cities/mx (lowercase) works ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/categories returns 8 categories with business_count ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/meta/city/cdmx returns proper meta tags ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/meta/country/mx returns country meta ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/meta/category/belleza-estetica returns category meta ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/businesses/mx/cdmx returns paginated response ✓
Backend: GET /api/seo/businesses with category filter ✓
Backend: Pagination params (page, limit) work correctly ✓
Backend: Rate limiting headers present (X-RateLimit-Limit, Remaining, Reset) ✓
Backend: Rate limiting headers on multiple endpoints ✓
Frontend: /mx (Country page) loads with 10 city cards ✓
Frontend: /mx shows Ciudades and Categorías populares sections ✓
Frontend: /mx/cdmx (City page) loads with 8 category links ✓
Frontend: /mx/cdmx shows breadcrumb navigation ✓
Frontend: /mx/cdmx/belleza-estetica (Category page) loads ✓
Frontend: Category page shows 'No hay resultados' (no businesses in CDMX) ✓
Frontend: Category page shows 'Otras categorías' section ✓
Frontend: Navigation between SEO pages works correctly ✓
action_items: OPTIONAL: Configure ingress to route /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt to backend, OR serve from frontend public folder
critical_code_review_comments: SEO router correctly implemented with all required endpoints
Rate limiting middleware working with proper headers
Meta tags dynamically generated based on page type and slug
SEOHead component properly sets document meta tags
SEORouter component correctly determines category vs business routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase P4 SEO implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Multi-country architecture with MX as default, (2) SEO endpoints for countries, cities, categories, meta tags, (3) Rate limiting middleware with headers, (4) Frontend SEO pages (CountryPage, CityPage, CategoryPage), (5) SEORouter component determines category vs business. NOTE: /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt endpoints are implemented in backend but blocked by ingress routing - only /api/* routes reach backend. All /api/seo/* endpoints work correctly.
